docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Collapsible

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Collapsible do use Phoenix.Component alias Phoenix.LiveView.JS def show_collapsible(js \\ %JS{}, id) do js |> JS.show( to: "##{id}-content", transition: {"ease-out duration-200", "opacity-0 -translate-y-1", "opacity-100 translate-y-0"}, time: 200 ) |> JS.set_attribute({"data-state", "open"}, to: "##{id}") end def hide_collapsible(js \\ %JS{}, id) do js |> JS.hide( to: "##{id}-content", transition: {"ease-in duration-150", "opacity-100 translate-y-0", "opacity-0 -translate-y-1"}, time: 150 ) |> JS.set_attribute({"data-state", "closed"}, to: "##{id}") end attr :id, :string, required: true attr :open, :boolean, default: false attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :inner_block, required: true def collapsible(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end attr :collapsible_id, :string, required: true attr :open, :boolean, default: false attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :inner_block, required: true def collapsible_trigger(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end attr :collapsible_id, :string, required: true attr :open, :boolean, default: false attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :inner_block, required: true def collapsible_content(assigns) do ~H"""
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end end

name: collapsible
title: Collapsible
